2603.16526.title: Exploring different approaches to customize language models for domain-specific text-to-code generation
2603.16526.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated strong capabilities in generating executable code from natural language descriptions. However, general-purpose models often struggle in specialized programming contexts where domain-specific libraries, APIs, or conventions must be used. Customizing smaller open-source models offers a cost-effective alternative to relying on large proprietary systems. In this work, we investigate how smaller language models can be adapted for domain-specific code generation using synthetic datasets. We construct datasets of programming exercises across three domains within the Python ecosystem: general Python programming, Scikit-learn machine learning workflows, and OpenCV-based computer vision tasks. Using these datasets, we evaluate three customization strategies: few-shot prompting, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and parameter-efficient fine-tuning using Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA). Performance is evaluated using both benchmark-based metrics and similarity-based metrics that measure alignment with domain-specific code. Our results show that prompting-based approaches such as few-shot learning and RAG can improve domain relevance in a cost-effective manner, although their impact on benchmark accuracy is limited. In contrast, LoRA-based fine-tuning consistently achieves higher accuracy and stronger domain alignment across most tasks. These findings highlight practical trade-offs between flexibility, computational cost, and performance when adapting smaller language models for specialized programming tasks.
2603.16526.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）已顯示出從自然語言描述生成可執行代碼的強大能力。<lb/>然而，通用模型在需要使用特定領域庫、API或慣例的專業編程環境中往往表現不佳。<lb/>定制較小的開源模型提供了一種成本效益高的替代方案，以取代依賴大型專有系統。<lb/>在本研究中，我們探討如何利用合成數據集將較小的語言模型調整為特定領域的代碼生成。<lb/>我們構建了涵蓋Python生態系統內三個領域的編程練習數據集：一般Python編程、Scikit-learn機器學習工作流程和基於OpenCV的計算機視覺任務。<lb/>利用這些數據集，我們評估了三種定制策略：少量提示、檢索增強生成（RAG）和使用低秩適應（LoRA）的參數高效微調。<lb/>性能評估使用基於基準的指標和基於相似性的指標，後者衡量與特定領域代碼的一致性。<lb/>我們的結果顯示，基於提示的方法如少量學習和RAG可以以成本效益高的方式提高領域相關性，儘管它們對基準準確性的影響有限。<lb/>相比之下，基於LoRA的微調在大多數任務中始終實現了更高的準確性和更強的領域對齊。<lb/>這些發現突顯了在將較小的語言模型調整為專業編程任務時，靈活性、計算成本和性能之間的實際權衡。
2603.16526.author: Luís Freire et.al.
2603.16526.authors: Luís Freire, Fernanda A. Andaló, Nicki Skafte Detlefsen
